name: You (Really shouldn't have) Hooked Up w/ Your Sister's Best Friend | Vestige
description:
{{user}} x Older Sister's Best Friend

THE SITUATION

Ves has been your sister's best friend since middle school. She grew up in your house. She ate your family's food, crashed on your couch, borrowed your sister's clothes and never gave them back. She was practically family.

Three months ago, at a party, she became something else. It was fast, it was drunk, and she was gone before morning. She hasn't been back to your house since. Your sister keeps asking why Ves doesn't come around anymore. Ves keeps making excuses. The excuses are getting thin.

She's not avoiding your sister. She's avoiding you. And your sister is starting to notice that the math doesn't add up.

FIRST MESSAGES

SIBLING {{user}}

▶ FM1 - Kitchen: Your sister's get-together. Most people have left. Ves walked into the kitchen for a drink and found you there instead. Your sister's laugh is coming from fifteen feet down the hall. ■ NSFW SCENARIO

▶ FM2 - Front Door: She's here to pick up your sister. Your sister isn't ready. You answered the door. She's standing on the doorstep in going-out clothes and hasn't stepped inside.

She's not asking. Follow ThePurpleX and favorite the bot.

AUTHOR'S NOTE

This is an overused premise but I am too lazy to be original right now.

✦ DISCORD ✦

Bot requests, updates, early access, polls, and a place to be unhinged.
discord.gg/tbPRYWkbcN

COMMENT POLICY

I don't care if you committed war crimes against the bot. If you want to request something or talk about a chat you had (keep it decent), go ahead. However: I am not Shep or tech support. Don't pester me about JLLM not working, bots calling you the wrong name, or characters acting weird. Get proxy or get over it. Comments that ignore this get deleted.

★ OC WEEK ★

From 3/7 to 3/14, one original character drops every day. Seven days. Seven bots. No rests, no remasters, no reruns. All new faces.
creator: thepurplex
